title: Wrong scope for select bits after block scope identifiers

features.name: hierarchical_scope_with_genvar_index_and_localparam_bit_select
features.description: Code should include a hierarchical scope reference using a genvar index, with a localparam used as the bit-select index inside nested generate blocks

features.name: localparam_from_genvar_in_nested_generate_blocks
features.description: Code should include a localparam assigned from a genvar loop variable within nested generate blocks, used as bit-select index in a hierarchical reference
